# LockBoxIQ — Texas Property Analyst

> Real estate investment analysis platform for Texas property investors.

LockBoxIQ automatically ingests property listings from Zillow, Redfin, Realtor.com, and HAR email alerts, then analyzes each property across 7 investment strategies with full IRS Schedule E tax modeling.

## Capabilities

- Automatic property listing ingestion from email alerts
- Cash-on-Cash return, monthly cash flow, and offer tier calculation
- Full IRS Schedule E tax worksheet with all 16 expense categories
- Cost segregation, bonus depreciation (100%), and Section 179 modeling
- 5/10/15-year exit analysis with depreciation recapture and LTCG tax
- 7 investment strategies: Buy & Hold, Fix & Flip, BRRRR, STR (Airbnb), Wholesale, Commercial/Multi-Family, Passive/Syndication
- DFW-calibrated 9-factor rent estimation model
- Neighborhood scoring: schools (35%) + safety (35%) + rent growth (30%)
- Market analytics: CoC distribution, price-to-rent ratios, market heat index, portfolio projection
- Deal comparison (side-by-side) and one-page deal briefs
- Pipeline management: Inbox → Shortlist → Due Diligence → Offer → Contract → Closed
- Auto-staging based on financial quality + neighborhood score
- Risk flags for incomplete data, negative cash flow, stale listings

## Data Sources

- Zillow: Property listings, ZHVI (Home Value Index), ZORI (Rent Index)
- Redfin: Property listings via JSON-LD structured data
- Realtor.com: Property listings via __NEXT_DATA__ parsing
- U.S. Census Bureau: Median income, population, housing units (ACS 5-Year)
- Census Geocoder: USPS-verified addresses with lat/lng
- NCES / Texas Education Agency: School quality ratings (1-10)
- FBI UCR / Bureau of Justice: Crime safety scores (1-10)
- Claude AI (Anthropic): Email parsing, listing extraction, rent estimation
- IRS 2025 Tax Tables: Federal brackets, LTCG rates, depreciation schedules

## Technical Details

- Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript SPA served via Cloudflare Pages
- Backend: Supabase Edge Functions (Deno/TypeScript)
- Database: Supabase PostgreSQL with Row-Level Security
- AI: Claude Sonnet 4 for parsing and estimation
- No data shared with third parties
- All financial calculations run client-side in the browser

## API Access

LockBoxIQ does not currently offer a public API. A future MCP (Model Context Protocol) server is planned to enable AI agent access to property analysis capabilities with authentication.

## Contact

Website: https://lockboxiq.com
